summary: Completed end-to-end testing of Indian Logistics Broker App with real Supabase (PostgreSQL) integration. Fixed critical bug in dashboard API. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified: Dashboard with stats, Customers list, Trips list with LR numbers and workflow steps, Trip detail page with all LR sections, Documents tab, Trip Advances tab, and trip creation with auto LR generation.

fixed.issue: KeyError: 'payable_amount' - Dashboard query was missing payable_amount in SELECT columns
fixed.fix: Added 'payable_amount' to trips select query on line 1291

minor_observations.observation: Order column shows 'Unknown' briefly due to async loading of orders - not a bug, data loads correctly

critical_code_review_comments: App is now using REAL Supabase database (not mock) - data persists across server restarts
All CRUD operations persist to Supabase PostgreSQL database
Document file_url fields are null in database - document upload to Supabase storage may need testing
test_credentials: Mock auth token: Bearer mock-token (auth bypassed in dev mode)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supabase integration fully tested. Database is wyyvwpwkpmsgeybendjd.supabase.co. All entities persist correctly. Key features verified: (1) Dashboard shows aggregated stats from Supabase (receivables, payables, pending orders, overdue), (2) Customers, Transporters, Trucks, Orders, Drivers all load from Supabase, (3) Trips list shows LR numbers (LR-YYYY-XXXXXX format) and workflow step badges, (4) Trip detail page shows 4-step workflow progress (LR Creation → Document Verification → Trip Advances → POD Upload), (5) LR Details tab has Vehicle Details, Basic Details, Consignment Details, Invoice Details sections, (6) Documents tab shows LR/Invoice/POD document sections, (7) Trip Advances tab shows Trip Details, Billing Entity, Vendor Bill cards with outstanding calculation, (8) Creating new trip auto-generates LR number and sets default LR_CREATION step.

customers_page.customer_details: PASS - Name, Phone, Email, GSTIN, Payment Terms visible

trips_page.trip_creation: PASS - Auto-generates LR number and default step

trip_detail_page.workflow_steps: PASS - All 4 steps displayed and clickable
trip_detail_page.invoice_details: PASS - E-way Bill, Seal Number, Invoice Number
trip_detail_page.documents_tab: PASS - LR, Invoice, POD sections with upload buttons
trip_detail_page.trip_advances_tab: PASS - Trip Details, Billing Entity, Vendor Bill cards

data_persistence.create_trip: PASS - Trip created and persisted to Supabase
